'''âsh-v-t-r''' ('''kashavteroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fordrive|fordrive]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fordrive|fordrive]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-v-t-r
|-
! Lemma
| kashavteroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishavteroko|thishavteroko]] || [[word:jishavteroko|jishavteroko]] || [[word:shishavteroko|shishavteroko]] || [[word:kishavteroko|kishavteroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushavteroko|thuthushavteroko]] || [[word:jujushavteroko|jujushavteroko]] || [[word:shushushavteroko|shushushavteroko]] || [[word:kukushavteroko|kukushavteroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushavteroko|thushavteroko]] || [[word:jushavteroko|jushavteroko]] || [[word:shushavteroko|shushavteroko]] || [[word:kushavteroko|kushavteroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushavteroko|thushavteroko]] || [[word:jushavteroko|jushavteroko]] || [[word:shushavteroko|shushavteroko]] || [[word:kushavteroko|kushavteroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshavteroko|theshavteroko]] || [[word:jeshavteroko|jeshavteroko]] || [[word:sheshavteroko|sheshavteroko]] || [[word:keshavteroko|keshavteroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshavteroko|thothoshavteroko]] || [[word:jojoshavteroko|jojoshavteroko]] || [[word:shoshoshavteroko|shoshoshavteroko]] || [[word:kokoshavteroko|kokoshavteroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshavteroko|thoshavteroko]] || [[word:joshavteroko|joshavteroko]] || [[word:shoshavteroko|shoshavteroko]] || [[word:koshavteroko|koshavteroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshavteroko|thoshavteroko]] || [[word:joshavteroko|joshavteroko]] || [[word:shoshavteroko|shoshavteroko]] || [[word:koshavteroko|koshavteroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshavteroko|thĂŠshavteroko]] || [[word:jĂŠshavteroko|jĂŠshavteroko]] || [[word:shĂŠshavteroko|shĂŠshavteroko]] || [[word:kĂŠshavteroko|kĂŠshavteroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashavteroko|thathashavteroko]] || [[word:jajashavteroko|jajashavteroko]] || [[word:shashashavteroko|shashashavteroko]] || [[word:kakashavteroko|kakashavteroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashavteroko|thashavteroko]] || [[word:jashavteroko|jashavteroko]] || [[word:shashavteroko|shashavteroko]] || [[word:kashavteroko|kashavteroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashavteroko|thashavteroko]] || [[word:jashavteroko|jashavteroko]] || [[word:shashavteroko|shashavteroko]] || [[word:kashavteroko|kashavteroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
